BATANES, CEBU (photos), LUZON: Ilocos Norte, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Davao, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN. Notes: In Luzon from Ilocos Norte to Sorsogon. Mossy forests, exposed ridges and ravines. 1000-2000m. Native.
